name: Jello Sherbet Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin in the boiling water.
2. Allow the mixture to cool slightly, then add the sherbet and stir gently until dissolved.
3. Chill the mixture until it is partially set.
4. Drain the pineapple and oranges, then cut the oranges into small pieces.
5. Whip the cream until light and fluffy.
6. Add the drained pineapple and sliced oranges to the partially set gelatin and sherbet mixture.
7. Quickly fold in the whipped cream.
8. Pour the mixture into a mold and refrigerate until firm.
9. Serve chilled, for 8 to 10 people.
